question: What can we conclude about the latest year's customer subscription performance from this chart?

options.A: The latest year has exactly the same total as the average of all previous years
options.B: The latest year clearly shows a sharp drop compared to previous years
options.C: The latest year has already recorded more subscriptions than any previous year
options.D: We cannot determine whether the latest year will end higher or lower than previous years based on the partial data

explanation: The area and line for the latest year include only about 4 months of data, while earlier years show totals for the full year. Visually, the latest year appears much lower, but this is purely because the period is shorter, not because the underlying performance has collapsed. Without the remaining months, we cannot judge the full-year outcome.
